text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while getting ready for the Hopeful
Stakes, Curren Chan bursts into my office with a
complaint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has been overworking herself by
doing excessive training on her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to get her to take it easy, so I decide on
bringing her to the planetarium with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back, she opens up a bit about her
feelings and her goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the burden she's been carrying has
become slightly lighter. From this point forward,
she refrains from burning herself out.
